name: Dahli
description:
'''Jeremy Brian Griffis''', known professionally as '''Dahli''', is an American musician, drag performer, and entertainer who competed on [[The Boulet Brothers' Dragula (season 2)|season 2]] and [[The Boulet Brothers' Dragula (season 4)|season 4]] of ''[[The Boulet Brothers' Dragula]]'', the latter of which they won and was crowned the "World's Next Drag Supermonster".

Also known as '''Jayy Von Monroe''', Dahli also became known for being a member of the band [[Blood on the Dance Floor (band)|Blood on the Dance Floor]]. They left the group in 2016 after allegedly being denied HIV medication from [[Dahvie Vanity]], whom Dahli has described as a sexual predator amid multiple misconduct allegations.
